name: Trust No Bunny
short_description: Everybunny has a secret. Who do you trust to keep the town safe? Trust No Bunny is a hilarious and incredibly cute social deduction game for fans of Werewolf or Among Us. It’s a game for thinkers, schemers, & downright liars, where guessing the traitors is only half the fun.
detailed_description:
What makes Trust No Bunny different from other social deduction games:

  • Players are never eliminated. Everybody plays until the end of the game
  • Card playing and resource management. Figuring out the traitors does not guarantee victory!
  • Secondary objectives. Winning as innocent townsfolk requires completing multiple objectives
  • Play against others or bots
  • Hundreds of costumes and emotes to earn
  • Rabbits

Trust No Bunny is being continuously developed by two brothers, Christian and Daniel. We have a great burgeoning community over at our Discord, and are always willing to teach new players! Drop by and say hi.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Japanese, Italian
